# Cold Call Reps

> Human cold outreach marketplace: AI-trained SDRs dial never-contacted leads to qualify or book appointments. Brands fund escrow and pay for verified results.

Cold calling is a numbers game for brands (volume of first-touch dials). For SDRs it is skill, speed, and consistency — with no hard earning ceiling on outcome pay.

## Product

- AI voice trainer + live coach for gatekeeper / decision-maker practice
- Quality-gated applications to brand campaigns
- Dialer, booking attribution, AI claim audit, Stripe Connect payouts
- Campaign outcomes: per booked meeting, per qualified lead, tiered accelerator
- Optional base pay: weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly (stacks with outcome pay)
- Platform fee: 20%, capped at $30 per outcome and $40/wk · $75/bi-weekly · $150/mo on base

## Who it is for

- Brands / founders: post campaigns; humans call Maps-scale / outbound lists with no prior email or LinkedIn touch; pay for qualify or book (not the close)
- SDRs / appointment setters: train, apply, get paid for results (global signup including PH and remote)

## Key URLs

- https://coldcallreps.com/
- https://coldcallreps.com/for/brands
- https://coldcallreps.com/for/reps
- https://coldcallreps.com/pricing
- https://coldcallreps.com/gigs
- https://coldcallreps.com/terms
- https://coldcallreps.com/privacy
- https://coldcallreps.com/sitemap.xml
- https://coldcallreps.com/robots.txt

## Out of scope (by design)

- Closing / closer compensation (separate from book-or-qualify)
- AI voice agents placing live brand calls (humans dial; AI coaches practice)

## Contact

- https://coldcallreps.com/sign-up
- support@coldcallreps.com
